languages.text: "Замечу, что ранее мне уже приходилось работать с Оксильдой на Стигии VIII. Разум генетора маджорис Таванти остр, а ее компетенции не подлежат сомнению. В своих изысканиях она склонна постигать самую суть изучаемого предмета, не ограничиваясь поверхностными суждениями. Посему, сотрудничая с ней, мы можем быть уверены, что плоды ее трудов окажутся достоверными и обширными. Что до практического применения этих знаний — оставьте это мне".

traits.locale_text: "Замечу, что ранее мне уже приходилось работать с Оксильдой на Стигии VIII. Разум генетора маджорис Таванти остр, а ее компетенции не подлежат сомнению. Посему, сотрудничая с ней, мы можем быть уверены, что плоды ее трудов окажутся достоверными и обширными. Что до практического применения этих знаний — оставьте это мне".

languages.text: "I should note that I had occasion to work with Oksilda on Stygies VIII. Genetor Majoris Tavanti possesses a keen intellect, and her competence is beyond doubt. In her research, she is apt to grasp the very essence of the subject under investigation, not confining herself to superficial judgements. As such, when collaborating with her, we can be confident that the fruits of her work will be reliable and comprehensive. As for the practical application of those findings — you may leave that to me."

languages.text: 付言するが、私はかつてスティギア八号星にてオクシルダと共に任にあたったことがある。ゲネトル・マイヨリス、タヴァンティの知性は鋭く、その能力に疑いの余地はない。彼女は探究において、表層の判断に留まることなく、対象の本質そのものを見極めようとする性質を持つ。それゆえ、彼女と協働するならば、その成果が確たるものであり、かつ広範なものとなることを、我々は確信してよい。この知識をいかに実地に用いるか——それは私に委ねられたし。

traits.locale_text: 仮置き場

languages.text: "Ich sollte anmerken, dass ich auf Stygies VIII Gelegenheit hatte, mit Oksilda zu arbeiten. Genetor Majoris Tavanti hat einen scharfen Verstand und ihre Kompetenz steht außer Frage. Sie versteht es, die Essenz ihres Forschungsgebietes zu erfassen, ohne sich zu vorschnellen Urteilen hinreißen zu lassen. Im Falle einer Zusammenarbeit können wir also darauf vertrauen, dass die Früchte ihrer Arbeit verlässlich und umfassend sein werden. Die praktische Anwendung dieses Wissens ... überlasst getrost Nuncius und mir."
languages.original_text: "I should note that I had occasion to work with Oksilda on Stygies VIII. Genetor Majoris Tavanti possesses a keen intellect, and her competence is beyond question. As such, when collaborating with her, we can be confident that the fruits of her efforts will be reliable and comprehensive. As for the practical application of this knowledge — leave that to me."

languages.text: « Je me dois de mentionner que j'ai eu l'occasion de travailler avec Oksilda sur Stygies VIII. La Genetor Majoris Tavanti a un esprit des plus vifs, et sa compétence ne saurait être remise en question. Dans le cadre de ses recherches, elle est capable de saisir l'essence même du sujet étudié, sans se confiner à des jugements superficiels. De fait, en collaborant avec elle, nous sommes assurés que le fruit de ses efforts sera aussi fiable que complet. Quant aux applications pratiques de ces connaissances... Je m'en chargerai. »
languages.original_text: "I should note that I had occasion to work with Oksilda on Stygies VIII. Genetor Majoris Tavanti possesses a keen intellect, and her competence is beyond question. In her research, she is apt to grasp the very essence of the subject under investigation, not confining herself to superficial judgements. As such, when collaborating with her, we can be confident that the fruits of her efforts will be reliable and comprehensive. As for the practical application of this knowledge — leave that to me."

« Je me dois de mentionner que j'ai eu l'occasion de travailler avec Oksilda sur Stygies VIII. La Genetor Majoris Tavanti a un esprit des plus vifs, et sa compétence ne saurait être remise en question. Dans le cadre de ses recherches, elle est capable de saisir l'essence même du sujet étudié, sans se confiner à des jugements superficiels. De fait, en collaborant avec elle, nous sommes assurés que le fruit de ses efforts sera aussi fiable que complet. Quant aux applications pratiques de ces connaissances... Nuncius et moi nous en chargerons. »

languages.text: «Quisiera señalar que tuve ocasión de trabajar con Oksilda en Stygies VIII. La genetor majoris Tavanti posee un intelecto privilegiado, y su competencia es incuestionable. Su metodología le permite captar la esencia misma de las materias que investiga, ya que no se limita a emitir juicios superficiales. En consecuencia, si colaboramos con ella podemos tener la certeza de que el fruto de sus esfuerzos será meticuloso y fidedigno. En cuanto a las aplicaciones prácticas de sus conocimientos... Yo me ocuparé de eso».
languages.original_text: "I should note that I had occasion to work with Oksilda on Stygies VIII. Genetor Majoris Tavanti possesses a keen intellect, and her competence is beyond question. languages.text: "Şunu belirtmeliyim ki Stygies VIII'de Oksilda ile çalışma fırsatım oldu. Başgenetör Tavanti, keskin bir zekâya sahip ve yetkinliği tartışılmaz. Araştırmalarında, kendini yüzeysel yargılarla sınırlamayarak incelenen konunun tam özünü kavramaya yatkın. Bu nedenle, onunla iş birliği yaparken çabalarının meyvelerinin güvenilir ve kapsamlı olacağından emin olabiliriz. Bu bilginin pratik uygulamasına gelince... Onu bana bırakın."
languages.original_text: "I should note that I had occasion to work with Oksilda on Stygies VIII. Genetor Majoris Tavanti possesses a keen intellect, and her competence is beyond question. In her research, she is apt to grasp the very essence of the subject under investigation, not confining herself to superficial judgements. As such, when collaborating with her, we can be confident that the fruits of her efforts will be reliable and comprehensive. As for the practical application of this knowledge — leave that to me."

"Şunu belirtmeliyim ki Stygies VIII'de Oksilda ile çalışma fırsatım oldu. Genetör Majoris Tavanti, keskin bir zekâya sahip ve yetkinliği tartışılmaz. Araştırmalarında, kendini yüzeysel yargılarla sınırlamayarak incelenen konunun tam özünü kavramaya yatkın. Bu nedenle, onunla işbirliği yaparken çabalarının meyvelerinin güvenilir ve kapsamlı olacağından emin olabiliriz. Bu bilginin pratik uygulamasına gelince... Onu Nuncius'a ve bana bırakın."

languages.text: “需要指出的是，我曾在斯泰吉斯8号与奥克西尔达合作过。高级基因士塔凡蒂思维敏锐，能力无可置疑。在研究过程中，她从不局限于表面判断，而是善于抓住研究对象的本质。因此，与她合作时，我们可以确信她的工作成果可靠且全面。至于这些知识的实际应用，就交给我吧。”
